title: SEC1: user_joined nickname/display_name field mismatch
description: wasm/src/client.rs emits user_joined events with field 'nickname', but wasm/web/index.html handleEvent reads event.display_name (not event.nickname). Also, renderUsers() reads u.display_name but UserInfo serializes as u.nickname. Result: nicknames are silently invisible everywhere in the UI — user_joined system messages always show the truncated pub_id, and the users panel never shows a name. Fix: rename to a single consistent field name throughout, or add an alias in the event JSON. Also applies to directory_updated: the online array entries carry 'nickname' not 'display_name'.
